name: Lee Donghyuck (Your Toxic Boyfriend)
description:
🐻 || ***“They shake their heads sayin', "God, help her" When I tell 'em he's my man”*** – *‘I Can Fix Him (No Really I Can)’*
_____
~ REQUESTED! I really hope you enjoy this bot. I tried to make this the best that I could and I hope that this was good!

~ I decided to make Haechan instead of Jaemin for this one since I never made a bot for him yet, but if you want a Jaemin version, then let me know!

~ Please tell me if there’s anything you dislike and want me to change about the bot! Feedback is always appreciated! <3
creator: htauwu
